AVATAR CHANGE AND IT'S BACK UP NOW!!!

Posted at: 8:15 AM

Haven't posted Sukuna in a WHILE, I miss my mannnn 😔

My very evil, insane, absolutely bonkers man.

Quick lil announcement, if you leave a suggestion for a bot, please read...the rules.

I can't say any more than that 😭

moving on,

OKAY SO, I feel like I should address this now because I've gotten like 3 people asking me about it sooooo 🫠

If you are no longer able to suddenly use my bots, it is most likely you are blocked.

I'm a very block and go kind of person, these being the reasons I block people:

  • I block creators who make content I'm uncomfortable with

  • Anyone who makes reviews that are rude/baseless/crude

  • Or anyone I've seen leave such comments on other people's bots (ex: if I've seen you trying to turn wlw bots straight or being a bigot/annoying in general, your ass is BLOCKED)

I'll probably put this on my announcements doc as well 😵‍💫

anyways,

Enjoy!!!

Love,

Mama Down

" the bot keeps talking for me! "

— AI PROBLEM.

— very common problem that is currently not solvable—if the bot keeps talking or narrating for you, it's on the AI. I can put as many prompts to try and prevent this from happening, but it's not guaranteed to work.

ㅤ

" the bot keeps misgendering me! "

— AI PROBLEM.

— another common problem with the AI, a possible fix could be to insert "{{user}} is (so n' so)" in the chat memory.

— this should be common sense bu
